body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Since we now remap all quantities onto the boundary space when we compute fluxes, there's no need to access the underlying data layouts of ClimaCore Fields, which was previously being done via `maybe_fv`.

Once we remove `maybe_fv` from `FluxCalculator.surface_inputs`, that becomes a one line function that we can just call directly rather than wrapping it in a separate function.

Plots in buildkite look visually unchanged.
title: remove FluxCalculator.surface_inputs

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Adds an option so that if restart files are available, we can choose to restart the state only (`restart_cache` false), or to restart both the state and the cache (`restart_cache` true). `restart_cache` is true by default, recovering the previous behavior.

If the cache is restarted (whether or not the state is), we perform an initial component model exchange and call `set_cache!` for each component model to make sure the caches all get fully set (e.g. for radiation).

As a next step we may want to add an option `checkpoint_cache` which we can set to false to avoid saving the very large cache JLD2 files.

closes #1544 

## Content
- [x] don't set dt in the atmos cache from the restart files
- [x] add an option `restart_cache`

cc @szy21
title: add an option `restart_cache`
